rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow users to set the alarm to either 'on' or 'off'.
The system shall ring the alarm continuously when the current time matches the set alarm time.
The system shall allow users to stop the alarm from ringing.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can set the alarm to 'on' or 'off'
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 1. We can set the alarm to ‘on’ or ‘off’;

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The alarm clock rings continuously when the current time becomes the set alarm time
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 2. When the current time becomes that which is set on the alarm, the alarm clock rings continuously;

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user can stop the ringing of the alarm clock
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: 3. We can make the ringing stop.
